name: StatusIcon
description: A status icon component that displays contextual icons with appropriate colors for success, info, warning, and danger states.
usage_guidelines: Use for displaying status indicators in alerts, notifications, and messages.
Choose appropriate type based on message severity.
Provide custom icon if default doesn't fit context.
Customize color with iconColor prop if needed.

type.description: Status type determining icon and color.

custom.description: Custom icon to replace default status icon.

iconColor.description: Custom color class to override default status color.

styling_info.visual_description: Icon with color matching status type: success (green), info (blue), warning (yellow), danger (red). Default size is text-xl.

Dont: Don't use for decorative purposes only
